scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:unit: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/i18n/locales.test.ts src/utils/adminMode.test.ts src/utils/analyticsRefresh.test.ts src/utils/browserStorage.test.ts src/utils/demoMode.test.ts src/utils/displayPreferences.test.ts src/utils/linkPassword.test.ts src/utils/linkPresentation.test.ts src/utils/linkView.test.ts src/utils/onlineUpgrade.test.ts src/utils/theme.test.ts src/utils/upgradeFeedback.test.ts src/utils/versionCheck.test.ts
